Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to create an event log from the given tables. Each order_id is a case. We have multiple tables: Orders, Order Lines, Delivery, Invoice, Payments. Also optional Products and Resources tables for enrichment.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Activities derived: Order Created from the Orders table with order_date Items Picked from Order Lines each pick event per item since multiple items with possibly different times we should create one event per item pick since each pick is a separate activity

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We need to define activity names clearly For example Order Created Item Picked Order Dispatched Order Arrived Invoice Issued Payment Received

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now build all events for each order sort by timestamp Lets list all events for each order Order 1001 Order Created timestamp 2024-01-01T09:00:00Z actor SP-001 Item Picked for ITEM-001 2024-01-02T10:15:00Z picker WH-001 quantity 2 Item Picked for ITEM-002 2024-01-02T11:00:00Z picker WH-002 Order Dispatched DLV-5001 2024-01-03T08:30:00Z carrier CR-01

Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: order 1004 It has order created only one item picked ITEM-001 and no delivery no invoice no payment Thats fine we include events for what exists

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: For order 1002 Order Arrived DLV-5003 2024-01-08T10:00:00Z which is before the invoice of 10:15 Actually time arrival 10:00 invoice 10:15 So we need to order correctly after DLV-5002 arrival then DLV-5003 arrival then invoice

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Decide on columns Case ID Activity Name Timestamp Actor Details where Details is a string like Item ITEM-001 Qty 2 or Delivery DLV-5001 Carrier GlobalTransport Note Normal route

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Now map resource names SP-001 Alice Brown SP-002 Bob Smith WH-001 David Lin WH-002 Eva Johnson WH-003 Frank Miller CR-01 GlobalTransport CR-02 FastShip CR-03 AirExpress BL-001 Gina Carter Now item descriptions ITEM-001 Widget A ITEM-002 Widget B

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Ensure all rows are sorted by Case ID then timestamp ascending within case Maintain chronological correctness
